summary: Recommends adding WIN-057b for the dome's confirmed WIN-057 (Global Cavity Re-Pressurization / SAA Dual-Lobe Synchronous Decay), following the 058/058b pattern. Verdict: Std Model Explains. The SAA multi-station synchrony is expected from MHD core-flow models (stations within 5,000-8,000 km correlation length). Substantially duplicates WIN-004/005/035/041 evidence. The numbering collision is documented in the new entry. Full replacement JSON for wins.json provided in the expansion file.
